workshops.metaDescription: Four modular EmAI workshops on cognitive robotics and Embodied AI: use case validation, robotics strategy, Physical AI deep dive, partner network. From use case to a productive robot pilot.

hero.title: Cognitive Robotics for Industry
hero.subtitle: Four workshops for strategy, engineering, and scaling -- from use case validation to a productive robot pilot.

tiers.title: The Four Workshops
tiers.subtitle: Modular by design -- from entry point through strategy and deep tech to scaling through partners.

items.title: Use Case & Autonomy Validation
items.format: 1 day · up to 8 people · on-site or remote
items.audience: Innovation managers, department heads, project leads
items.promise: Avoids "pilot purgatory". Use cases are systematically scored against business impact, data availability, and realistic autonomy level -- before pilots become dead ends.

phases.title: Alignment
phases.description: Autonomy scale 0-5, ODD (Operational Design Domain), and expectations calibrated

phases.title: Use Case Deconstruction
phases.description: Tasks broken down into "gestures", autonomy levels assigned

phases.title: Validation & Risk Mapping
phases.description: AUCA Blueprint, safety and fallback strategy

items.assets: AUCA Blueprint (Autonomous Use Case Alignment) · DDT Breakdown Deck · ODD Environment Audit · Autonomy Readiness Scorecard · Digital Twin Sandbox (optional)
items.outcome: Validated requirements specification + prioritized backlog with business cases.

items.title: Robotics Strategy Workshop
items.audience: Executive board, plant management, strategy planning
items.promise: Understand VLA disruption, find brownfield leverage, model ROI. Embodied AI at board level.

phases.title: Moravec's Paradox
phases.description: why the leverage of automation is reversing right now

phases.title: Use Case Discovery
phases.description: re-evaluate processes that were previously not automatable

phases.title: ROI Modeling
phases.description: hardware, cloud, implementation against the status quo

items.assets: Design Thinking for Embodied AI · Business Model Canvas for agentic systems · brownfield audit of existing infrastructure · hands-on assessment with live examples
items.outcome: Strategic roadmap at executive level with clear milestones for 12, 24, and 36 months.

items.title: Physical AI Deep Dive
items.subline: From dataset to runnable VLA model.
items.audience: ML engineers, software developers, automation engineers
items.promise: Three to five days hands-on. Fine-tune foundation models on your industrial tasks -- from dataset to sim-to-real transfer.

phases.title: Sim-to-Real Transfer
phases.description: NVIDIA Isaac Sim · pre-train on millions of interactions

phases.title: Cloud-to-Edge Deployment
phases.description: secure, low-latency inference on robot controllers

items.assets: PyTorch · ROS 2 · Hugging Face · NVIDIA Isaac Sim/Lab · JupyterHub sandbox per participant · pre-installed VLA models and datasets
items.outcome: A runnable VLA model on your use case, deployable to robot controllers.

items.title: Partner Network
items.audience: Consultancies, system integrators, regional implementation partners
items.promise: Become certified EmAI partners. EmAI remains the technical brain; partners deliver on-site integration and sales.

phases.title: Bronze · Referral Partner
phases.description: lead introduction, commission on net workshop revenue

phases.title: Silver · Certified Training Partner
phases.description: independent delivery of standard workshops under EmAI brand, license fee per participant

phases.title: Gold · Strategic Solutions Partner
phases.description: complex implementations with 3rd-level support, co-marketing, and cloud orchestration

items.assets: Certified curriculum · cloud sandbox · co-branding material
items.outcome: EmAI delivers "cognitive brains" and fleet orchestration -- partners deliver hardware and on-site integration.

engagementPath.title: Engagement Path
engagementPath.intro: Three steps from first conversation to a productive robot pilot -- each step validates the next.

steps.label: Validation
steps.description: Clarity on feasibility, autonomy level, ROI

steps.label: Pilot
steps.workshop: Robotics Strategy + Physical AI Deep Dive (Workshop 02 + 03)
steps.description: Roadmap at executive level, hands-on prototype in parallel, runnable model

engagementPath.outcome: In 6-12 months from first use case to a productive robot pilot -- without the classic pilot purgatory.

methodology.title: Methodology & Workshop Cloud
methodology.intro: All workshops use a personalized cloud sandbox per participant (JupyterHub or VS Code Server) with pre-installed models, data, and tools.

items.title: Zero setup effort
items.description: No laptop installations, no compatibility issues.

items.title: Secure data bubble
items.description: Sensitive data does not leave the controlled environment.

items.title: Synthetic data
items.description: Sim-to-real closes the data gap of industrial robotics.

items.title: Remote-ready
items.description: On-site or distributed, same quality, same tools.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: The sandbox stays usable after the workshop as a base for pilot projects.

segments.title: Industry
segments.description: Automotive, electrical, machinery, consumer goods. Complex manipulation, quality control, flexible material handling.

segments.title: Mid-Sized Companies
segments.description: Labor shortage as the driver. Affordable entry through the partner network.

segments.title: Public Sector
segments.description: Inspection, clinic logistics, city operations, disaster response. Robots where staff is missing.

publicSector.title: Physical AI for Public Administration
publicSector.intro: Automate physical tasks where staff is missing -- from road monitoring to clinic logistics.

items.title: Infrastructure
items.subtitle: Roads, bridges, networks
items.description: Autonomous damage detection via computer vision. Mobile robots and drones for inspection runs.

items.title: Properties
items.subtitle: Building maintenance
items.description: Inspection robots for municipal properties. Sensor systems for predictive maintenance.

items.title: Hospitals
items.subtitle: Clinic logistics
items.description: Transport robots for materials and samples in university hospitals. Frees nursing staff from courier runs.

items.title: Smart City
items.subtitle: City operations
items.description: Robots and sensors for cleaning, waste, green spaces. Data-driven facility management.

items.title: Utilities
items.subtitle: Facility inspection
items.description: Tunnels, wastewater plants, energy networks. Robots reduce manual inspections in hazardous areas.

items.title: Disaster Response
items.subtitle: Search & rescue
items.description: Ground robots and drones for fire brigades and emergency services. Deployment in rubble and hazardous zones.

eastSideFab.title: East Side Fab Anchor
eastSideFab.intro: Saarbrücken hub for cognitive robotics. Workshops as an integrated part of FabCademy®, with direct access to industry partners and research institutes.

items.title: Makerspace & open space
items.description: We bring the cloud, the Fab brings the room.

items.title: Pilot partner program
items.description: Discounted conditions in exchange for case studies.

items.title: Saarland visibility
items.description: IT.CON, GovTech Campus, regional innovation events.

about.title: About EmAI
about.intro: A specialized two-person team with deep cloud-native and Embodied AI expertise. Open-source DNA, our own platform, compatible with all common VLA frameworks.

items.title: Cloud-native depth
items.description: Kubernetes, data pipelines, edge orchestration. In production use.

items.title: NeoDEM platform
items.description: Our own fleet management for cognitive robots.

items.title: Open-source DNA
items.description: SmolVLA, Pi-0, GR00T -- we build the stacks we use.

items.title: Saarland-anchored
items.description: East Side Fab as home, direct access to industry and administration.

about.differentiator: Depth over breadth. We don't deliver slides -- we deliver runnable systems.
about.anti: No generic AI consulting. Specialists for the gap between cloud and robot, where Vision-Language-Action models turn promises into productivity.

cta.title: Free 30-minute first conversation
cta.body: We assess your use case and recommend the right format.
